top_signals.title: State of Freight 5 takeaways: Montgomery talk; short-term strength
top_signals.summary:
Fallout from the Montgomery case was a subject in this month’s State of Freight webinar.

The post State of Freight 5 takeaways: Montgomery talk; short-term strength appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: IMF Approves About $1 Billion Disbursement for Argentina in Fresh Win for Milei
top_signals.summary: The International Monetary Fund’s executive board approved Argentina’s latest program review to unlock about $1 billion, a vote of confidence in President Javier Milei despite missing a key program target.
